content: 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory systems can be re-framed as a hierarchical collective of micro-agents, where each micro-agent specializes in curating a small chunk of episodic memory and actively votes on which unlabeled memory fragments the full agent should prioritize integrating next. This splits the single agent's active memory workload into a distributed curiosity-driven decision process across nested sub-agents.
